_comment: Deterministic render settings for the plugin safety harness. The cached payload (real Open-Meteo + astral data for Dallas, 2026-06-14) drives every weather screen without a network call; the frozen instant matches that day so the hourly/daily screens show real future data. 06-14 is a day astral resolves cleanly, so the almanac shows a real moonrise (5:26am) and moonset (8:42pm). Moon phase 0.97 renders as 'Waning Crescent' — the longest restored phase name, which exercises the title fit/abbreviation fallback at every panel size.
